data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the existence of a verification endpoint for checking key validity, as specified in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or endpoints that confirm this functionality. The absence of any evidence related to the verification endpoint indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of a verification endpoint/workflow for checking key validity.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define verification endpoint for key validity
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Implement and validate the existence of an endpoint that checks the validity of issued keys.
